name: md2docx-pdf
description: Convert one or more .md files to .docx and/or .pdf. Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux. Auto-detects pandoc and Chrome/Edge on the user's system and prints platform-specific install commands if dependencies are missing.

browser.description: Chrome, Edge, or Chromium for PDF output only. Auto-searched from common paths.

arguments.inputs: .md file paths or glob patterns like *.md. Supports multiple files.
arguments.-f: Output format: docx (default), pdf, or both
arguments.-o: Output directory. If omitted, files land next to their source .md files.

pipeline.pdf: .md -> pandoc -> html5 -> inject CJK CSS -> headless browser -> .pdf
